productDisplayName: Indian Terrain Men Montez Yellow T-shirt
description: "Mail By Aniket Keshi & Syed, on 25 April 2012" Composition Yellow and white striped stretch pique polo neck t-shirt made of 96% cotton and 4% lycra, has a black ribbed collar with yellow stripe detailing, short sleeves with ribbed hems in white and black stripe detailing, buttoned chest placket, vented hem and embroidered brand logo Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash cold using mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Stripes that add immense style to your casual look is what indian terrain brings into your life with its Pier 17 collection. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish Montez t-shirt, while the stretchable cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day, allowing you to move with ease. The ribbed sleeve hems sit snug on well toned arms, and the vented hem offers a comfortable Fit around the waist. Pair it with denims or corduroys and Sports or suede shoes to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6& rsquo Shoulders: 18& rdquo
